title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, file upload, RAG, admin panel); install via Docker in one command.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async APIs, streaming, embedding, model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama: chat, generate, pull, delete, and list models with a simple DSL.

title: ollama-cli (node)
summary: Lightweight Node CLI wrapper around ollama-js; pipe stdin, save conversations, switch models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Docker Compose, GPU tuning, function calling examples.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-run Docker Compose stacks with Ollama, WebUI, Open-WebUI, Postgres, and RAG addons.

title: ollama-kt (Kotlin multiplatform)
summary: Kotlin multiplatform HTTP client for Ollama; targets JVM, Android, macOS, Linux, Windows, iOS.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embeddings, streaming, model management.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama; tokio based, serde JSON, streaming chat, embed, pull/delete.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats using any Ollama model; slash commands, context per channel.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into Slack threads with configurable system prompts.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for summarization, Q&A, and note rewriting.

title: ollama-npm (unofficial)
summary: Community npm wrapper exposing REST endpoints; lightweight alternative to official ollama-js.
